prompt_text: Compare Rippling and Gusto for automate HR payroll benefits and IT provisioning in a single platform
response:
# Rippling vs. Gusto: HR, Payroll, Benefits & IT Platform Comparison

## Quick Overview

| Feature | Rippling | Gusto |
|---------|----------|-------|
| **Core Strength** | Unified HR + IT + payroll | Payroll + HR focus |
| **Company Size** | Mid-market to enterprise | Small to mid-market |
| **Best For** | Tech-forward companies | Growing small businesses |

---

## Head-to-Head Comparison

### 1. **Payroll & Compensation**
| Aspect | Rippling | Gusto |
|--------|----------|-------|
| **Payroll Processing** | ✅ Excellent | ✅ Excellent |
| **Multi-state/Country** | ✅ 150+ countries | ✅ US + limited international |
| **Tax Compliance** | ✅ Advanced automation | ✅ Good automation |
| **Contractor Support** | ✅ Strong | ✅ Basic |
| **Compliance Updates** | ✅ Real-time | ✅ Reliable |

**Winner:** Rippling (if global or complex compliance needed); Gusto (if US-focused and simple)

---

### 2. **Benefits Administration**
| Aspect | Rippling | Gusto |
|--------|----------|-------|
| **Carrier Integrations** | ✅ 500+ carriers | ✅ 200+ carriers |
| **Open Enrollment** | ✅ Sophisticated workflows | ✅ User-friendly |
| **COBRA Management** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **Commuter Benefits** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Limited |
| **Integration Depth** | ✅ Deeper | ✅ Adequate |

**Winner:** Rippling (more comprehensive)

---

### 3. **IT Provisioning & Management** 🎯
| Aspect | Rippling | Gusto |
|--------|----------|-------|
| **Device Management** | ✅ Native (laptop, phone setup) | ❌ Not included |
| **Access Management** | ✅ SSO, directory sync | ⚠️ Limited |
| **Application Provisioning** | ✅ 500+ apps | ❌ Not available |
| **Offboarding Automation** | ✅ Revokes all access | ❌ Manual process |
| **Security Features** | ✅ Advanced | ⚠️ Basic |

**Winner:** **Rippling by far** (this is the key differentiator)

---

### 4. **User Experience**
| Aspect | Rippling | Gusto |
|--------|----------|-------|
| **Admin Interface** | Modern but complex | Intuitive & simple |
| **Employee Self-Service** | ✅ Strong | ✅ Very strong |
| **Mobile App** | ✅ Good | ✅ Excellent |
| **Learning Curve** | ⚠️ Steep | ✅ Quick onboarding |

**Winner:** Gusto (simpler to implement)

---

### 5. **Pricing**
| Model | Rippling | Gusto |
|-------|----------|-------|
| **Starting Price** | ~$10-15/employee/month | ~$6-12/employee/month |
| **IT Add-on** | Included | Would need separate tools |
| **Total Cost** | Higher upfront | Lower (but requires other tools) |
| **Transparency** | Custom quotes | Public pricing |

**Winner:** Gusto (lower entry cost)

---

## Integration Ecosystem

### Rippling
- **Native integrations:** 500+ apps (Slack, GitHub, Okta, Salesforce, etc.)
- **IT focus:** Device management, MDM, SSO
- **Strength:** Single source of truth for all employee data

### Gusto
- **Limited integrations:** Mainly accounting (QuickBooks, Xero) and select HR tools
- **Requires:** Separate SSO, device management solutions
- **Strength:** Works well with existing stacks for small businesses

---

## Decision Framework

### **Choose Rippling if you:**
